course.title: Cybersecurity Foundations
course.description: A complete intro to the platform: setting up your environment, running your first recon script, and understanding the toolchain behind our walkthroughs.

lessons.title: Installing Nmap — Complete Setup Guide
lessons.description: Install, verify, and run your first Nmap scan on Linux, macOS, and Windows. No prior experience needed.

lessons.title: Installing Burp Suite Community Edition
lessons.description: Get PortSwigger's industry-standard web proxy running on Kali Linux or via the JAR method on Termux with a desktop session. GUI required — two paths covered.
lessons.imageAlt: Web application security proxy and HTTP traffic interception

lessons.title: Installing Metasploit Framework — CLI Setup Guide
lessons.description: Get the world's most widely used penetration testing framework running on Kali Linux or Termux (NetHunter). Two install paths, one goal — a working msfconsole.
lessons.imageAlt: Cybersecurity penetration testing terminal and network exploitation

lessons.title: Installing SQLmap — SQL Injection Tool Setup Guide
lessons.description: Get the world's most popular automated SQL injection framework running on Kali Linux or Termux. Pure CLI — works on any platform with Python 3.
lessons.imageAlt: Database server infrastructure and SQL vulnerability scanning

lessons.title: Installing Wireshark — Complete Setup Guide
lessons.description: Install TShark (CLI) and Wireshark (GUI), capture your first packets, and understand the difference between the two tools. Covers NetHunter and Kali Linux.
lessons.imageAlt: Network cables and packet flow infrastructure

lessons.title: Installing ZAP — Web App Scanner Setup Guide
lessons.description: Install the Zed Attack Proxy (ZAP by Checkmarx) on Kali Linux, launch the GUI, and run your first automated web vulnerability scan in minutes.
lessons.imageAlt: Web application security scanning and vulnerability analysis
